zh.lifeSummary: 當Content Thurston於1667年6月出生在美國羅得島紐波特時，她的父親Edward Thurston II46歲，母親Elizabeth Mott38歲。她於1690年與Thomas Wood在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托蕾托 康普頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1728年8月22日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特蕾托 康普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Content Thurston于1667年6月出生在美国罗德岛州紐波特时，她的父亲Edward Thurston II46岁，母亲Elizabeth Mott38岁。她于1690年与Thomas Wood在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托蕾托 康普頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1728年8月22日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特蕾托 康普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Thurston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Anglo-Norman, Anglo-Scandinavian, and Middle English personal name Thurstan, Thorsten (Old Norse Thórsteinn, Thorsten, Anglicized as Old English Thurstān; see Thorstensen ).
habitational name from Thurston in Suffolk, so called from the genitive case of the Old Norse personal name Thóri (see Thor ) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Tustin
meanings: English (Worcestershire, Warwickshire and Gloucestershire): variant of   Thurston  .

variants.name: Thorstensen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Thorsten, a variant of Thorstein, Old Norse Thórsteinn, composed of the name of the god Thórr (see Thor ) + steinn ‘stone, rock’, hence meaning ‘altar of Thor’ or perhaps ‘hammer of Thor’.

nameMeanings.name: Content
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Dino, Orfeo, Vito.
Italian and Spanish: nickname for someone with a cheerful disposition, from contento ‘happy, pleased’.

historicEvents.description: The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.

The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.

historicEvents.title: Pirates Hung in Newport
historicEvents.description: On July 17, 1723, twenty-eight pirates are hung in Newport, Rhode Island.

en.lifeSummary: When Content Thurston was born in June 1667, in Newport, Rhode Island, United States, her father, Edward Thurston II, was 46 and her mother, Elizabeth Mott, was 38. She married Thomas Wood in 1690, in Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died before 22 August 1728, in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Content Thurston est née en juin 1667, à Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis, son père, Edward Thurston II, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mott, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Wood en 1690, à Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée avant 22 août 1728, à Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Content Thurston im Juni 1667 in Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Thurston II 46 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Mott 38. Sie hat 1690 in Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Thomas Wood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb vor 22. August 1728 in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Content Thurston è nata il nel giugno 1667 nel Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Edward Thurston II, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Mott, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Wood nel 1690, nel Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì prima del 22 agosto 1728, nel Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ja.Newport, Colony of Rhode Island and Prov: アメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルト
ja.lifeSummary: Content Thurstonが1667年6月にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトで生まれた時，父Edward Thurston IIは46歳，母Elizabeth Mottは38歳であった。1690年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリストルリットル コンプトンでThomas Woodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1728年8月22日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトリットル コンプトンで死去した。

ko.Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, U: 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 뉴포트
ko.Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 리틀 콤프턴
ko.lifeSummary: Content Thurston(이)가 1667년 6월 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Thurston II(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Mott(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1690년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 리틀 콤프턴에서 Thomas Wood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1728년 8월 22일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Content Thurston nasceu em junho de 1667, em Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Edward Thurston II, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mott, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Wood em 1690, em Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 22 de agosto de 1728, em Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Content Thurston родилась июнь 1667 г. в местности нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Edward Thurston II было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mott, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Wood в 1690 г. в местности литл комптон, бристол, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла перед 22 августа 1728 г. в местности литл комптон, нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Content Thurston nació en junio de 1667, en Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos, su papá, Edward Thurston II, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mott, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Thomas Wood en 1690, en Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió antes de 22 de agosto de 1728, en Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.
